name: I Hate You, I Love You
original_name: I Hate You, I Love You
overview: A suspense and mature drama about five different people and how their lives get intertwined by a twist of fate and jealousy. Some of them will soon learn what it is like to get betrayed by a friend and to betray... all while trying hard to get what they want the most - love.

trailers.title: I Hate You I Love You [Official Trailer]
